title: GSL Study Sets
label: GSL Quiz
intro: Dedicated GSL practice console. Replace the starter setup questions with source-backed GSL questions as the content bank grows.

questions.prompt: Which file powers the questions shown on the GSL study console?
questions.citation: The GSL page loads docs/assets/data/gsl-quiz-batches.json through the data-quiz-data attribute on its quiz script tag.

questions.prompt: Which page is the dedicated direct-access entry point for GSL practice?
questions.citation: docs/gsl/index.html is the private GSL study page and uses the shared quiz renderer with the GSL question bank.

questions.prompt: When adding a new GSL question, which field controls the answer explanation shown after revealing the key?
questions.citation: Each question's citation field is rendered inside the answer key after the learner reveals it.

questions.prompt: What should be done before replacing the starter GSL questions with real study material?

options.text: Add source-backed prompts, answers, and citations to the GSL JSON file
Delete the existing private quiz page

questions.citation: The GSL page is content-driven. Real GSL content should be added to docs/assets/data/gsl-quiz-batches.json with source-backed citations.

questions.prompt: Why does the GSL page reuse docs/assets/js/quiz.js instead of duplicating the quiz UI code?

options.text: So both quiz pages share the same checked-answer behavior and only differ by data file
So GSL questions are stored in CSS
So the GSL page becomes public on the home page
So answer keys are always visible

questions.citation: The shared renderer now accepts a page-specific data-quiz-data attribute, so separate question banks can use the same interaction logic.

questions.prompt: Which redirect file can be used as a short direct-access URL for the GSL console?
questions.citation: docs/gsl-console.html redirects directly to docs/gsl/ for private GSL access.
